gacha_overdraft.insufficient_balance: Your Stargem balance is insufficient for this transaction.
gacha_overdraft.credit_explanation: The IPC extends credit facilities to valued customers. Your balance will go negative.
gacha_overdraft.interest_warning: Note: Negative balances accrue %.1f%% daily interest. The Corporate Reconciliation Team may contact you regarding payment.

gacha_ipc_credit.title: IPC CREDIT FACILITY
gacha_ipc_credit.description: The IPC provides flexible credit options for valued customers experiencing temporary liquidity constraints.
gacha_ipc_credit.how_works_1: - Your account has a credit ceiling based on your VIP status and purchase history.
gacha_ipc_credit.how_works_2: - You may spend beyond your current balance up to this ceiling.
gacha_ipc_credit.how_works_3: - Your balance becomes negative when using credit.
gacha_ipc_credit.interest_2: - Continued delinquency may prompt Corporate Reconciliation Team intervention.
gacha_ipc_credit.interest_3: - Earn Stargems through gameplay or purchase packages to restore positive balance.
gacha_ipc_credit.increase_1: - Purchase VIP Passes for permanent ceiling increases.
gacha_ipc_credit.increase_2: - Regular top-ups and purchases demonstrate creditworthiness.

vip_promo.insufficient_msg: Your Stargem balance is insufficient for this transaction.
vip_promo.overdraft_vip_only: Overdraft protection is exclusively available to VIP Pass subscribers.

arena.lobby_title: Spiral Abyss Arena - Today's Match Card
arena.select_champion: Select a champion to battle with:
arena.invalid_champion: Error: Invalid champion selection. Returning to lobby.
arena.champion_not_found: Error: Selected champion not found. Returning to lobby.
arena.credit_exhausted: Your credit facility is exhausted. You cannot afford even the minimum bet of %s Stargems.
arena.insufficient_credit: Your available credit (%s Stargems) is insufficient for the minimum bet of %s Stargems.
arena.insufficient_balance: Your balance (%s Stargems) is insufficient for any available bet option.
arena.max_bet_per_champion: Maximum bet per champion is %s SG. Current bet on %s: %s SG. Max additional: %s SG.
arena.max_bet_reached: Maximum bet per champion is %s SG. Max additional: %s SG.
arena.select_champion_bet: Select champion to bet on (you can choose multiple champions):
arena.odds_dynamic: Odds are dynamic based on current HP and round number.
arena.higher_hp_worse_odds: Higher HP champions have worse odds (lower payout).
arena.odds_factor_hp: Current odds factor in HP status and round number.
arena.bet_locked_odds: This bet will be locked at the current odds.

arena_results.defeat: DEFEAT. All your champions have been decommissioned.
arena_results.bet_returned: Your bet of %s Stargems has been returned.

arena_suspend.stand_up: You stand up abruptly. 'Hold that thought! I'll be right back!'
arena_suspend.announcer_pause: The arena announcer pauses mid-sentence. The crowd murmurs in confusion.
arena_suspend.combatants_wait: 'The combatants will remain where they are. Don't be long.'
arena_suspend.return_30_days: The arena announcer's voice crackles over ancient speakers: 'AFTER %d DAYS... THEY... RETURN.' Dust falls from the ceiling. 'THE COMBATANTS HAVE BEEN STANDING PERFECTLY STILL, AGING GRACEFULLY, WAITING FOR YOU.'
arena_suspend.return_7_days: The arena manager rushes over, eyes bloodshot. '%d DAYS! Do you know how long it takes to keep a crowd entertained when nothing is happening? We've been doing puppet shows with fighter debris!'
arena_suspend.return_1_day: A maintenance drone bumps into you. 'Welcome back after %d days,' it drones. 'The combatants have not moved. The crowd has not moved. Time has... mostly not moved. Can we start now?'
arena_suspend.return_hours: The arena attendant looks surprised. 'Back already? Only %s hours have passed.' They whisper to a colleague: 'I lost the bet. I said they'd be gone at least a day.'
arena_suspend.crowd_stirs: The crowd stirs from their torpor as the combatants finally unlock their joints.

financial.caution_dispatched: CAUTION: A Corporate Reconciliation Team has been dispatched.
financial.notification_monthly_set: Casino notifications set to monthly (VIP rewards, debt interest). Critical alerts (90%% threshold, collector dispatch) always show.
financial.notification_daily_set: Casino notifications set to daily (VIP rewards, debt interest). Critical alerts (90%% threshold, collector dispatch) always show.

cashout.welcome_1: Thank you for calling Tachy-Impact Customer Support!
cashout.welcome_2: Your credits are important to us. Please listen carefully as our menu options have changed.
cashout.promo: Did you know? You can spend your Stargems on rare ships right now! No waiting required!
cashout.menu_sales: For sales and new accounts, press 2.
cashout.menu_representative: To speak with a representative, press 0.
cashout.note_unavailable: *Note: Option 0 is currently unavailable in your sector.*
cashout.billing_busy: We're sorry, but our billing system is currently experiencing high call volumes.
cashout.billing_try_later: Please try again later or visit our website at www.tachy-impact.nope
cashout.sales_offer: Great news! We have a special offer on Stargem packages today!
cashout.sales_no_cashout: Unfortunately, we cannot process cashouts through this line.
cashout.please_hold: Please hold for the next available representative...
cashout.wait_4min: Your estimated wait time is: 4 minutes
cashout.wait_12min: Your estimated wait time is: 12 minutes
cashout.wait_47min: Your estimated wait time is: 47 minutes
cashout.wait_2hrs: Your estimated wait time is: 2 hours
cashout.wait_unavailable: Your estimated wait time is: UNAVAILABLE
cashout.music_elevator: *Elevator music plays softly in the background...*
cashout.music_synth: *A synth version of 'Fractured Spacetime' plays on loop...*
cashout.music_humming: *Someone is humming off-key in the distance...*
cashout.music_skips: *The hold music skips and repeats the same 3-second clip...*
cashout.fact_transactions: Did you know? Tachy-Impact processes over 50 transactions per day!
cashout.fact_vip_music: Fun fact: Our VIP members enjoy 5%% better hold music quality!
cashout.fact_spending: Reminder: Spending Stargems is faster than cashing out!
cashout.fact_premium: Tip of the day: Premium ships appreciate in value!
cashout.fact_give_up: Did you know? 9 out of 10 customers give up before reaching a representative!
cashout.security_instruction: Before we proceed, please complete this security verification:
cashout.captcha_3: Security Verification: What is the square root of 144?
cashout.captcha_6: Security Verification: Solve for X: X + 23 = 50
cashout.wrong_1: That answer doesn't match our records. Please try again.
cashout.wrong_2: Incorrect. Are you sure you're not a robot?
cashout.wrong_3: Wrong answer. Let me transfer you back to the beginning... just kidding, try again!
cashout.wrong_5: That is not the answer we were looking for.
cashout.steve_greeting: Hello! Thank you for holding. My name is Steve.
cashout.steve_acknowledge: I understand you'd like to cash out your Stargems.
cashout.steve_upsell_1: Have you tried spending your Stargems on our premium ship collection instead?
cashout.steve_upsell_2: We have some excellent deals right now!
cashout.steve_no_cashout: No, I want to cash out
cashout.steve_transfer: I see. Let me transfer you to our Senior Account Specialist.
cashout.steve_authority: They have the authority to process cashout requests.
cashout.all_busy: All our senior representatives are currently assisting other customers.
cashout.call_back_hours: Please call back during normal business hours.
cashout.business_hours: (Normal business hours: 3:00 AM to 3:15 AM, Tuesdays only)
cashout.pending_cashout: We see you have a pending cashout request from your previous call.
cashout.connecting_rep: Please hold while we connect you to a representative...
cashout.request_not_found: Your previous request ID could not be located in our system.
cashout.start_over: Please start the process again from the beginning.
cashout.thank_you: Thank you for choosing Tachy-Impact Financial Services!

notifications.debt_max_limit: Debt has reached maximum limit. Interest accrual paused.
notifications.debt_collector_warning: WARNING: Debt collectors may be dispatched!
notifications.monthly_debt_notice: MONTHLY DEBT NOTICE: Your debt of %s Stargems continues to accrue %.1f%% daily interest. Consider purchasing a VIP pass for a reduced rate.
notifications.critical_debt_warning: WARNING: Your debt is at %.0f%% of your credit ceiling! Corporate Reconciliation Teams may be dispatched soon!

debt.near_threshold: WARNING: Your debt of %s Stargems is at 90%% of the collection threshold! Credit ceiling: %s. Reduce your debt to avoid Corporate Reconciliation Teams.
debt.dispatched: A Corporate Reconciliation Team has been dispatched to collect your debt. They will arrive in %d days.
debt.recalled: The Corporate Reconciliation Team has been recalled - your debt is below the collection threshold.
debt.defeated: The Corporate Reconciliation Team has been defeated. However, your debt remains and continues to accrue interest.
debt.arrived: A Corporate Reconciliation Team has arrived to collect your debt!

poker.dealer_eyes_coldly: The IPC Dealer eyes you coldly.
poker.left_early_warning: 'You left the table early last time. The IPC Credit Facility does not tolerate table-hoppers.'
poker.return_after_days: 'You may return to play poker in %.1f days.'

poker.insufficient_credit_stack: Your available credit (%d Stargems) is insufficient for the minimum stack size of %d Stargems.
poker.please_topup: Please visit Stargem Top-up to purchase more gems.
poker.balance_below_minimum: Your Stargem balance is below the minimum. Choose a fixed stack size to use overdraft.
poker.not_enough_credit: Not enough Stargems or available credit! You have %d Stargems and %d available credit, but requested %d.
poker.overdraft_warning: WARNING: Negative balances accrue daily interest. Ensure you can repay this debt promptly!

poker.insufficient_msg: Your Stargem balance is insufficient for this transaction.

poker_ui.chips_out_new_game: One of the players is out of chips. Starting new game...

poker_suspend.stand_up: You stand up abruptly. 'Hold that thought! I'll be right back!'
poker_suspend.dealer_eyebrow: The IPC Dealer raises an eyebrow but nods slowly. 'The cards will stay as they are.'
poker_suspend.dont_be_long: 'Don't be long. We have other customers waiting.'
poker_suspend.flip_table_msg: You are about to flip the table and storm out.
poker_suspend.stack_returned: Your stack of %d Stargems will be returned to your balance.
poker_suspend.early_leave_warning: WARNING: If you leave early (less than %d hands played), you will receive a 1-day cooldown before playing again.
poker_suspend.consider_suspend: Consider using 'Tell Them to Wait (Suspend)' instead to pause the game without penalty.
poker_suspend.abandon_msg: You are about to abandon the suspended poker game.
poker_suspend.could_return: You could also return later to resume the suspended game.
poker_suspend.sit_back_down: You sit back down. The game continues.
poker_suspend.dealer_stares: The IPC Dealer stares at you with dead eyes.
poker_suspend.gone_30_days: 'You've been gone for %.1f days.' The dealer gestures to a cobweb-covered chair. 'We've been standing perfectly still, not breathing, not blinking. The other players have started to fossilize.'
poker_suspend.gone_7_days: 'Welcome back after %.1f days.' The dealer cracks their neck audibly. 'We've been practicing our statue impressions. I think I've forgotten how to sit down.'
poker_suspend.gone_1_day: 'Ah, you've returned.' The dealer cracks their knuckles. 'Only %.1f days. We've been holding our breath this whole time. Lightheaded? Very.'
poker_suspend.gone_hours: 'Back already? It's only been %.1f hours.' The dealer looks almost disappointed. 'We were just getting comfortable with the silence.'
poker_suspend.cards_havent_moved: 'The cards haven't moved. Let's finish this...'
poker_suspend.cash_out_leave: You cash out %d Stargems and leave the table.
poker_suspend.dealer_note_early: The IPC Dealer makes a note in their ledger. 'Leaving so soon? The IPC Credit Facility remembers early departures.'

poker_result.you_fold_pot: You fold. The IPC Dealer scoops the pot of %d Stargems.
poker_result.dealer_fold_pot: The IPC Dealer folds. You scoop the pot of %d Stargems!
poker_result.flip_table_crash: You flip the table with a loud crash!
poker_result.typical_player: A nearby bystander mutters under their breath: "Tsk, Typical Gachy Impact player."
poker_result.cash_out_storm: You cash out %d Stargems and storm out.
poker_result.out_of_chips: You're out of chips! Game over.
poker_result.opponent_out: Opponent is out of chips! You win!

poker_help.title: --- Texas Hold'em ---
poker_help.intro: Make the best 5-card hand using your 2 hole cards and 5 community cards.
poker_help.rank_1: 1. Royal Flush - A, K, Q, J, 10, same suit
poker_help.rank_2: 2. Straight Flush - Five consecutive same suit
poker_help.rank_3: 3. Four of a Kind - Four same rank
poker_help.rank_4: 4. Full House - Three of a kind + pair
poker_help.rank_7: 7. Three of a Kind - Three same rank
poker_help.action_check: - Check: Pass (only if no bet to call)
poker_help.leave_warning: Leaving mid-hand or flipping the table forfeits your bet!

blackjack_help.title: --- Blackjack ---
blackjack_help.intro: Beat the dealer by getting closer to 21 without going over.
blackjack_help.goal_1: Get a higher total than the dealer without exceeding 21.
blackjack_help.value_2: - Face cards (J, Q, K): 10 points each
blackjack_help.action_double: - Double Down: Double bet, receive one card, then stand
blackjack_help.action_split: - Split: Split matching cards into two hands (if you have enough chips)
blackjack_help.push_1: - Push: Tie with dealer, bet returned
